items.title: Pollard, Tajinder Dhillon script stunning comeback as MI New York stun Seattle Orcas
items.summary: MI New York secured a remarkable 17-run victory against Seattle Orcas. Seattle appeared to be cruising towards victory after a strong start. MI New York's bowlers struck at regu...

items.title: Jimmy Alapag bets on continuity as NLEX Road Warri...
items.summary: Jimmy Alapag, who served as Sacramento Kings' player development coach, made a winning PBA head coaching debut as NLEX Road Warriors routed Macau Giant Pandas 114-75.

items.title: Santner backs Duffy as New Zealand's 'front man' for West Indies ODIs
items.summary: New Zealand are missing several first-choice quicks due to injuries and workload management, leaving Duffy as the most experienced seamer
